name: Cashbox Jewelry & Pawn
description_short: Family-owned Tucson pawn shop since 1957 specializing in luxury jewelry, designer watches, handbags, and large collateral loans at two locations.
description_long:
Cashbox Jewelry & Pawn Co. has operated in Tucson, Arizona since 1957, making it one of the city's longest-running pawn businesses. Family-owned throughout its history, the company has built a reputation focused on the upper end of the pawn market—luxury goods, high-value jewelry, and designer items rather than the low-value general merchandise typical of many pawn shops. The business operates two Tucson locations: one on S. Craycroft Road and one on E. Grant Road, with the Craycroft location positioned as the flagship for its upscale experience and broader service offering.

Cashbox offers the full range of pawn shop services centered on collateral-based lending with no credit checks required. Customers can pawn or sell fine jewelry from brands like Cartier, Tiffany & Co., and David Yurman; luxury watches including Rolex and Omega; designer handbags from Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Hermès, and Prada; gold, silver, and platinum bullion; rare and graded collectible coins; electronics; musical instruments; tools; and designer footwear. Firearms are available at the Craycroft location only. The company also operates an online shop for pre-owned luxury inventory and offers flexible layaway plans including a 10-10-10 option (10% down, 10 payments over 10 months) with no interest and no credit checks.

What distinguishes Cashbox from typical pawn shops is its deliberate focus on the luxury and collectibles segment. The company employs on-site gemologists and jewelry experts, which supports more accurate appraisals of high-value items and enables the large loan amounts they advertise. The business claims to offer the lowest pawn interest rates in Tucson, though specific rate figures are not published on the website. With 839+ Google reviews averaging 4.8 stars, customer satisfaction appears consistently high across both locations.

For Tucson residents, Cashbox is a legitimate option for collateral-based borrowing against luxury and high-value assets, or for buying pre-owned luxury goods at below-retail prices. The main caveat is geographic: both locations are in Tucson only, making this inaccessible to anyone outside the metro area. Interest rates on pawn loans, while claimed to be competitive, are not disclosed upfront—borrowers should confirm rates before committing. As with any pawn loan, failure to redeem an item within the loan term means permanent loss of the collateral.
pros: Nearly 70 years in business — established in 1957, one of Tucson's longest-running pawn shops
4.8-star Google rating from 839+ verified customer reviews
On-site gemologists for professional jewelry and watch appraisals
Specializes in luxury/high-value items, enabling large loan amounts not typical at standard pawn shops
Flexible layaway with 20% down and a 10-10-10 plan (10% down, 10 months, no interest)
No credit checks required for loans or layaway
Two Tucson locations with extended weekday hours (open Saturdays)
cons: Tucson-only operation — no online lending, no service outside the Tucson metro area
Pawn interest rates are not published on the website despite claiming 'lowest in town'
Firearms sales restricted to the Craycroft location only — not available at Grant
Craycroft location is closed Sundays; Grant has limited Sunday hours (10AM–4PM)
Pawn loans require surrendering the item — non-redemption means permanent loss of collateral
best_for: Tucson residents who need fast cash against luxury jewelry, watches, or designer goods without a credit check
Collectors and bargain shoppers looking for pre-owned Rolex, Hermès, or other luxury brands at below-retail prices
Buyers who want flexible layaway on high-ticket items without financing or credit approval
Sellers of gold bullion, collectible coins, or estate jewelry seeking expert appraisal
diagnosis: Cashbox is best suited for Tucson-area consumers who own luxury or high-value assets and need a collateral loan without a credit check, or who want to buy pre-owned designer goods at a discount. The main caveat is that it is a local brick-and-mortar operation only — there is no remote or online lending — and pawn loan interest rates, while advertised as competitive, are not disclosed publicly before visiting.
services: Fine jewelry buy and sell (Cartier, Tiffany & Co., David Yurman)
Luxury watch buy and sell (Rolex, Omega)
Designer handbag buy and sell (Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Hermès, Prada)
Gold, silver, and platinum bullion buying
Electronics and musical instruments (TVs, laptops, guitars, amps)
Firearms buy and sell (Craycroft location only)
Flexible layaway plans (20% down or 10-10-10 plan, no interest)
Online shop for pre-owned luxury inventory
